svg.text: 5 dimensions · 3 facts (fact constellation) · read live from Supabase via get_schema · public schema
fact_order_items grain: one row per order item. fact_payments grain: (order_id, payment_sequential). fact_reviews grain: (review_id, order_id).
dim_order is the shared hub for all three facts — order-level attributes live once, keeping the item-grain fact lean (lightly snowflaked).
All natural/business keys carry a UNIQUE constraint (not shown) enabling idempotent ON CONFLICT loads.
